task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for 3-Bedroom Condo in Manhattan NY (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2800000.00 and wholesale is $2240000.00. Product features: Luxury high-rise condo with doorman and rooftop terrace in Upper East Side. Reference: https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for 3-Bedroom Condo in Manhattan NY. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying 3-Bedroom Condo in Manhattan NY. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
